summary: Agentic AI momentum accelerates: Intapp Celeste launched today for professional services. Gemini 3.1 Pro continues to dominate conversation with 1M context. Security alert: 8 critical n8n CVEs disclosed—upgrade to 2.5.2+ immediately. DeepSeek V4 rumors persist. LangChain alternatives gaining traction: Flowise, Pydantic AI, n8n.

highlights.title: Intapp Celeste: Agentic AI for Professional Firms
highlights.summary: Purpose-built agentic AI platform for highly regulated industries. Context Engine knows firm data, terminology, relationships, work patterns.
highlights.relevance: Agentic AI for regulated industries—relevant pattern for Gulf financial services.
highlights.action: Study Celeste Context Engine approach for TonalityIQ/EventHorizonIQ

highlights.title: CRITICAL: n8n 8 CVEs Disclosed
highlights.summary: Eight high-to-critical vulnerabilities in n8n workflow automation. Earlier patching guidance invalidated. Upgrade to 2.5.2+ required.
highlights.relevance: If using n8n in any pipeline—audit immediately. RCE vulnerabilities present.
highlights.action: Check all n8n instances; upgrade to 2.5.2+ if deployed

highlights.title: Gemini 3.1 Pro: 1M Context Live
highlights.summary: Google's Pro-tier model now available. 77.1% ARC-AGI-2, full multimodal. Direct competitor to GPT-5.2/Claude Opus 4.6.
highlights.relevance: Benchmark against current baselines. 1M context enables new use cases.
highlights.action: Test Gemini 3.1 Pro latency/cost vs Claude Opus 4.6 for coding tasks

highlights.title: DeepSeek V4: Leaked Benchmarks
highlights.summary: Rumored 90% HumanEval, 1M context. Expected mid-February. Price undercut threat to OpenAI/Anthropic.
highlights.relevance: Pricing pressure on frontier models. Gulf clients may prefer non-US options.
highlights.action: Monitor for official announcement; prepare cost comparison matrix
